steps.title: Find the key signal in the contrast
steps.content: The passage states that non-Indigenous museums “tend to anticipate mainly non-Indigenous audiences and rely on Euro-centric strategies,” directly contrasting with Indigenous centers designed for the tribe's own citizens using traditional knowledge.

steps.title: Match the stated difference to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly states what the passage describes — that the museums are “largely aimed at non-Indigenous audiences,” matching the explicit claim that non-Indigenous museums “anticipate mainly non-Indigenous audiences.” The other three cite details absent from the passage or describe an attribute that isn't the stated point of contrast.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
